settlement.name: Settl. Basics
settlement.desc: Establishes the foundations of your settlement.
settlement.tooltip: Unlocks the Hoard Pile for storing resources and the Lab for gathering Dust.

basic_obs.name: Basic Observation
basic_obs.desc: Trains observers to watch enemy movements more closely.
basic_obs.tooltip: Expands the Lab's observation radius by 1 tile, collecting Dust from a wider area.

pattern_rec.name: Pattern Recognition
pattern_rec.desc: Deciphers the goblin tongue from battlefield recordings.
pattern_rec.tooltip: Unlocks Goblin Translations lore entries in the Bestiary.

structural.name: Structural Analysis
structural.desc: Studies how goblins wear down fortifications over time.
structural.tooltip: Displays age counters on towers, showing how many waves they have survived.

aquatic.name: Aquatic Studies
aquatic.desc: Catalogues creatures lurking in the coastal shallows.
aquatic.tooltip: Unlocks the Fish tower (fast attack) and the Seahorse tower (stealth detection).

avian.name: Avian Mastery
avian.desc: Trains a great heron as a precision aerial striker.
avian.tooltip: Unlocks the Heron tower, a high-damage single-target sniper.

the_forge.name: The Forge
the_forge.desc: Harnesses steam and iron to push beyond the stone age.
the_forge.tooltip: Advances the settlement to the Steam Age, enabling industrial buildings.

automation.name: AI Automation
automation.desc: Constructs a mechanical agent that never sleeps.
automation.tooltip: Unlocks the Robot support, which automatically casts spells during waves.

variable.name: Animal Husbandry
variable.desc: Domesticates local primates for resource logistics.
variable.tooltip: Unlocks the Monkey Hut (assigns monkeys to gather, courier, or boost) and the Stockpile.

variable.name: Resource Interface
variable.desc: Reroutes the stockpile directly into the settlement ledger.
variable.tooltip: Unlocks Interface Mode on Stockpiles — deposited items go straight to your inventory.

variable.name: Monkey Training
variable.desc: Refines training regimens to house an extra monkey.
variable.tooltip: Each existing and future Monkey Hut gains +1 monkey capacity.

variable.name: Apiculture
variable.desc: Cultivates hives whose swarms harry goblin raiders.
variable.tooltip: Unlocks the Beehive building, which sends bees to sting and slow nearby enemies.

variable.name: Reptilian Lore
variable.desc: Bonds with a vicious lizard that haunts the stone walls.
variable.tooltip: Unlocks the Lizard tower, a close-range area-damage attacker.

variable.name: Magnificent Show
variable.desc: A charismatic performer who disorients enemy formations.
variable.tooltip: Unlocks the Clown support, which periodically reverses enemy movement direction.

variable.name: Crude Optics
variable.desc: Grinds rough lenses that dramatically extend Lab range.
variable.tooltip: Expands the Lab's observation radius by 2 tiles.

variable.name: Fortification
variable.desc: Designs reinforced stone barriers to funnel enemy paths.
variable.tooltip: Unlocks the Wall tower, a cheap placeable obstacle with no attack.

variable.name: Bonfire Theory
variable.desc: Studies the morale effect of light and warmth on defenders.
variable.tooltip: Unlocks the Campfire tower, which buffs the fire rate of adjacent towers.

variable.name: Prim. Cartography
variable.desc: Charts the surrounding terrain to expose hidden routes.
variable.tooltip: Immediately reveals 5 random map tiles, potentially uncovering resource nodes.

variable.name: Fermentation
variable.desc: Brews a potent ale to bolster defenders between waves.
variable.tooltip: Unlocks a consumable Ale item that temporarily boosts gold income.

variable.name: Tremor Analysis
variable.desc: Documents the rumbling patterns beneath the settlement.
variable.tooltip: Unlocks a secret lore entry about the tremors in the Bestiary.
